articles.summary: 6,57 zł — tyle maksymalnie będzie kosztował litr oleju napędowego na stacjach paliw w Polsce w czwartek 28 maja. To spadek o 18 gr dzień do dnia. Maksymalna cena dla benzyny Pb95 wynosić będzie 6,31 zł za litr, a dla benzyny Pb98 – 6,86 zł. Tak wynika z najnowszego obwies

articles.title: AutoZone stock has worst day in four years, despite retailer beating Wall Street estimates
articles.summary: Concerns include international growth and margin compression as well as pressures from inflation, energy costs and potential supply chain disruptions.

articles.title: American Airlines picks SpaceX's Starlink for in-flight Wi-Fi on more than 500 planes
articles.summary: American Airlines said it will install SpaceX's Starlink for inflight Wi-Fi on more than 500 of its airplanes.

articles.title: IMAX has held ‘preliminary talks’ with potential buyers, source says
articles.summary: IMAX has held "preliminary talks" through intermediaries, but no official pitches have been made directly by the company, a source told CNBC.

articles.title: Trump administration says new EPA rules will save you money at the supermarket. It's not clear they will
articles.summary: Trump delayed Biden-era EPA refrigerant rules, saying the move will lower grocery costs, though the impact on food prices remains unclear.

articles.title: Stellantis targets 35% North American sales increase, led by Ram Trucks and Chrysler revival
articles.summary: Stellantis said at an investor day Thursday that it plans to increase its North American sales by 35% by 2030.

articles.title: Spirit's collapse, high fuel prices test limits of summer vacation spending
articles.summary: The unofficial start of the summer travel season on Memorial Day weekend will show just how much travelers want to fly and how much they're willing to pay.

articles.title: ‘Blue dot fever’? What's really behind a tricky summer dynamic for live music
articles.summary: As prices rise everywhere, consumers are choosing to be more intentional with how they're spending on live music and concerts this year.

articles.title: Move over, seltzer. Non-carbonated drinks are taking the spotlight
articles.summary: Non-carbonated alcoholic drinks like Surfside and BeatBox are stealing "share of throat" from hard seltzers, particularly among Gen Z.

articles.title: Disney's 'Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu' tallies lowest Thursday preview sales in franchise history
articles.summary: Disney's "Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu" tallied $12 million in Thursday night previews, the lowest collection of advance tickets in franchise history.

articles.title: Two top Walmart executives leave company under new CEO John Furner

articles.title: Trump said he'd 'remember' companies that didn't apply for tariff refunds. Many of them are anyway
articles.summary: Walmart confirmed to CNBC it has sought a tariff refund and plans to use any money it receives back to invest in lower prices for shoppers.

articles.summary: A source told CNBC that IMAX has held "preliminary talks" through intermediaries, but no official pitches have been made by the company.

articles.title: Egg prices are plunging due to oversupply — and producers say margins are taking a hit as costs rise
articles.summary: Egg prices are plunging from oversupply after avian flu shortages, but producers say persistent feed, fuel and labor costs are squeezing margins.

articles.summary: The deal will create one of the largest real estate companies in the U.S., with more than 180,000 rental apartments.

articles.title: Stellantis CEO sees opportunity in growing partnerships, bringing China-branded vehicles to North America
articles.summary: Stellantis CEO Antonio Filosa said there could be an opportunity to bring Chinese-branded vehicles into Mexico and potentially Canada, but not the U.S.
